name: Qwen-3.5-397B-A17B
_comment_arch_warning: HYBRID linear/full attention model. layer_types alternates 3:1 linear-attention to full-attention (15 full + 45 linear of 60 total). The framework treats EVERY layer as full attention (O(S²) compute, full KV cache), which OVER-estimates attention FLOPs by ~4× and KV cache by ~4× at long context. Per scratch/model_specific_extensions.md, hybrid attention + linear-attention stacks are a documented gap; modeling-fidelity work needed for accurate predictions on this model class.
_comment_k_active: 10 routed experts + 1 shared expert (shared_expert_intermediate_size=1024 = I_moe). Shared expert approximated by k=11.
